name: JSON Feed Runtime Seed
description: Python runtime seed that consumes octopus-json-v1 and returns structured feedback.

brain.prompt: Map a cognitive Need to one compact Python JSON feed. Use the full octopus-json-v1 envelope, return evidence first, and never expose hidden reasoning.
brain.feedback_contract: Return status, output, evidence, metadata, and the next useful signal in compact JSON.

skills.description: Feed observe, verify, compare, and reproduce Needs through a non-shell JSON runtime.

tools.description: Consume the full octopus-json-v1 tool call envelope and return structured feedback.
tools.output: JSON status, output, evidence, and metadata

surfaces.description: Tool-side JSON feed prompt and feedback contract.
JSON feed descriptions, inputs, outputs, and call contract.
Python runtime adapter that consumes octopus-json-v1.
Checks and constraints that keep structured feedback stable.

constraints: Return compact evidence and metadata without hidden reasoning.
